No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects the study of Algebra to poverty eradication.

Quality Education.reason: This graduate-level course provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and explicitly strengthens fundamental mathematical, logical reasoning, and scientific computing skills (Target 4.4).

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects the study of Algebra to gender equality.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course fosters '獨立研究與創新之能力' and '強化建立數學模型，解決問題之能力,' directly supporting Target 9.5 by enhancing scientific research and innovation.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects the study of Algebra to marine life or ocean conservation.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects the study of Algebra to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects the study of Algebra to peace, justice, or institutional strength.
